titles.ar: باب الْمَيِّتِ يَمُوتُ وَ هُوَ جُنُبٌ أَوْ حَائِضٌ أَوْ نُفَسَاءُ
titles.en: Chapter 25 – The dying one is dying and he is with sexual impurity, or a menstruating woman, or a woman with post-childbirth bleeding

titles.ar: باب الْمَيِّتِ يَمُوتُ وَ هُوَ جُنُبٌ أَوْ حَائِضٌ أَوْ نُفَسَاءُ
titles.en: Chapter 25 – The dying one is dying and he is with sexual impurity, or a menstruating woman, or a woman with post-childbirth bleeding

segments: قُلْتُ لَهُ مَاتَ مَيِّتٌ وَ هُوَ جُنُبٌ كَيْفَ يُغَسَّلُ وَ مَا يُجْزِئُهُ مِنَ الْمَاءِ فَقَالَ يُغَسَّلُ غُسْلًا وَاحِداً يُجْزِئُ ذَلِكَ عَنْهُ لِجَنَابَتِهِ وَ لِغُسْلِ الْمَيِّتِ لِأَنَّهُمَا حُرْمَتَانِ اجْتَمَعَتَا فِي حُرْمَةٍ وَاحِدَةٍ .
arabic.text: قُلْتُ لَهُ مَاتَ مَيِّتٌ وَ هُوَ جُنُبٌ كَيْفَ يُغَسَّلُ وَ مَا يُجْزِئُهُ مِنَ الْمَاءِ فَقَالَ يُغَسَّلُ غُسْلًا وَاحِداً يُجْزِئُ ذَلِكَ عَنْهُ لِجَنَابَتِهِ وَ لِغُسْلِ الْمَيِّتِ لِأَنَّهُمَا حُرْمَتَانِ اجْتَمَعَتَا فِي حُرْمَةٍ وَاحِدَةٍ .

segments: Ali Bin Ibrahim, from his father, from Hammad Bin Isa, from Hareyz, from Zurara who said,

‘I said to him<sup>asws</sup>, ‘A dying one died and he was with sexual impurity. How should he be washed and what would suffice him from the water?’ So he<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘He would be washed with one washing, that would suffice him from it for his sexual impurity and for the washing of the deceased, because these two (washings) are two sacred ones, being together in one sanctity’.
en.hubeali.text:
Ali Bin Ibrahim, from his father, from Hammad Bin Isa, from Hareyz, from Zurara who said,

‘I said to him<sup>asws</sup>, ‘A dying one died and he was with sexual impurity. How should he be washed and what would suffice him from the water?’ So he<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘He would be washed with one washing, that would suffice him from it for his sexual impurity and for the washing of the deceased, because these two (washings) are two sacred ones, being together in one sanctity’.

segments: 1. Ali ibn Ibrahim has narrated from his father from Hammad ibn ‘Isa from Hariz from Zurarah, in a Muzmar manner, who has said the following: “I once said to him (the Imam), ‘Alayhi al-Salam, that there is one who has died after sexual relation but before Ghusl (bath). How is Ghusl (bath) prescribed for him and how much water is needed? He (the Imam) said, ’Only one Ghusl (bath) is sufficient for both reasons, each of which is inviolable requiring one inviolable act (Ghusl (bath)).’”
en.sarwar.text: 1. Ali ibn Ibrahim has narrated from his father from Hammad ibn ‘Isa from Hariz from Zurarah, in a Muzmar manner, who has said the following: “I once said to him (the Imam), ‘Alayhi al-Salam, that there is one who has died after sexual relation but before Ghusl (bath). How is Ghusl (bath) prescribed for him and how much water is needed? He (the Imam) said, ’Only one Ghusl (bath) is sufficient for both reasons, each of which is inviolable requiring one inviolable act (Ghusl (bath)).’”

gradings.raw: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: حسن - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (13/329)
gradings.label: حسن
gradings.text: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: حسن - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (13/329)

narratorChain.raw: عَلِيُّ بْنُ إِبْرَاهِيمَ عَنْ أَبِيهِ عَنْ حَمَّادِ بْنِ عِيسَى عَنْ حَرِيزٍ عَنْ زُرَارَةَ قَالَ

titles.ar: باب الْمَيِّتِ يَمُوتُ وَ هُوَ جُنُبٌ أَوْ حَائِضٌ أَوْ نُفَسَاءُ
titles.en: Chapter 25 – The dying one is dying and he is with sexual impurity, or a menstruating woman, or a woman with post-childbirth bleeding

segments: سَأَلْتُهُ عَنِ الْمَرْأَةِ إِذَا مَاتَتْ فِي نِفَاسِهَا كَيْفَ تُغَسَّلُ قَالَ مِثْلَ غُسْلِ الطَّاهِرَةِ وَ كَذَلِكَ الْحَائِضُ وَ كَذَلِكَ الْجُنُبُ إِنَّمَا يُغَسَّلُ غُسْلًا وَاحِداً فَقَطْ .
arabic.text: سَأَلْتُهُ عَنِ الْمَرْأَةِ إِذَا مَاتَتْ فِي نِفَاسِهَا كَيْفَ تُغَسَّلُ قَالَ مِثْلَ غُسْلِ الطَّاهِرَةِ وَ كَذَلِكَ الْحَائِضُ وَ كَذَلِكَ الْجُنُبُ إِنَّمَا يُغَسَّلُ غُسْلًا وَاحِداً فَقَطْ .

segments: Muhammad Bin Yahya, from Muhammad Bin Ahmad, from Ahmad Bin Al Hassan Bin Ali, from Amro Bin Saeed, from Musaddaq Bin Sadaqa, from Ammar Bin Musa,

(It has been narrated) from Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup>, said, ‘I asked him<sup>asws</sup> about the woman when she dies in her post-childbirth bleeding, how would she be washed. He<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘Similar to the washing for the cleanliness (menstruation free), and similar to that is the menstruating woman, and similar to that is the one with sexual impurity. But rather, she would be washed with one washing only’.
en.hubeali.text:
Muhammad Bin Yahya, from Muhammad Bin Ahmad, from Ahmad Bin Al Hassan Bin Ali, from Amro Bin Saeed, from Musaddaq Bin Sadaqa, from Ammar Bin Musa,

(It has been narrated) from Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup>, said, ‘I asked him<sup>asws</sup> about the woman when she dies in her post-childbirth bleeding, how would she be washed. He<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘Similar to the washing for the cleanliness (menstruation free), and similar to that is the menstruating woman, and similar to that is the one with sexual impurity. But rather, she would be washed with one washing only’.

segments: 2. Muhammad ibn Yahya has narrated from Muhammad ibn Ahmad from Ahmad ibn al-Hassan ibn Ali from ‘Amr ibn Sa‘id from Musaddiq ibn Sadaqah from ‘Ammar ibn Musa who has said the following: “I once asked abu ’Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, about the case of a woman who dies during her child- birth, how Ghusl (bath) to be given for her? He (the Imam) said, ‘It is just like cleansing Ghusl (bath) after blood discharge is over and so also is the case with a woman during her Hayd (menses) and after sexual relation: only one Ghusl (bath) is sufficient.’”
en.sarwar.text: 2. Muhammad ibn Yahya has narrated from Muhammad ibn Ahmad from Ahmad ibn al-Hassan ibn Ali from ‘Amr ibn Sa‘id from Musaddiq ibn Sadaqah from ‘Ammar ibn Musa who has said the following: “I once asked abu ’Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, about the case of a woman who dies during her child- birth, how Ghusl (bath) to be given for her? He (the Imam) said, ‘It is just like cleansing Ghusl (bath) after blood discharge is over and so also is the case with a woman during her Hayd (menses) and after sexual relation: only one Ghusl (bath) is sufficient.’”

gradings.raw: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: موثق - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (13/330)
gradings.label: موثق
gradings.text: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: موثق - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (13/330)

narratorChain.raw: مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ يَحْيَى عَنْ مُحَمَّدِ بْنِ أَحْمَدَ عَنْ أَحْمَدَ بْنِ الْحَسَنِ بْنِ عَلِيٍّ عَنْ عَمْرِو بْنِ سَعِيدٍ عَنْ مُصَدِّقِ بْنِ صَدَقَةَ عَنْ عَمَّارِ بْنِ مُوسَى عَنْ أَبِي عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ( عليه السلام ) قَالَ

titles.ar: باب الْمَيِّتِ يَمُوتُ وَ هُوَ جُنُبٌ أَوْ حَائِضٌ أَوْ نُفَسَاءُ
titles.en: Chapter 25 – The dying one is dying and he is with sexual impurity, or a menstruating woman, or a woman with post-childbirth bleeding

segments: الْمَرْأَةِ إِذَا مَاتَتْ نُفَسَاءَ وَ كَثُرَ دَمُهَا أُدْخِلَتْ إِلَى السُّرَّةِ فِي الْأَدَمِ أَوْ مِثْلِ الْأَدَمِ نَظِيفٍ ثُمَّ تُكَفَّنُ بَعْدَ ذَلِكَ .
arabic.text: الْمَرْأَةِ إِذَا مَاتَتْ نُفَسَاءَ وَ كَثُرَ دَمُهَا أُدْخِلَتْ إِلَى السُّرَّةِ فِي الْأَدَمِ أَوْ مِثْلِ الْأَدَمِ نَظِيفٍ ثُمَّ تُكَفَّنُ بَعْدَ ذَلِكَ .

segments: Sahl Bin Ziyad, from Ibn Mahboub, and Ahmad Bin Muhammad,

‘Regarding the woman, when she dies with post-childbirth bleeding, and there is a lot of blood, she would be entered into the bag up to the navel, or like a clean bag, then she would be enshrouded after that’.
en.hubeali.text:
Sahl Bin Ziyad, from Ibn Mahboub, and Ahmad Bin Muhammad,

‘Regarding the woman, when she dies with post-childbirth bleeding, and there is a lot of blood, she would be entered into the bag up to the navel, or like a clean bag, then she would be enshrouded after that’.

segments: 3. Sahl ibn Ziyad has narrated from ibn Mahbub and Ahmad ibn Muhammad in a Muzmar manner who has said the following: “Abu ‘Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, has said, ‘A woman, who dies during her child-birth with a great deal of blood discharge, is placed in a clean bag of treated skin up to her bellybutton; then she is shrouded.’”
en.sarwar.text: 3. Sahl ibn Ziyad has narrated from ibn Mahbub and Ahmad ibn Muhammad in a Muzmar manner who has said the following: “Abu ‘Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, has said, ‘A woman, who dies during her child-birth with a great deal of blood discharge, is placed in a clean bag of treated skin up to her bellybutton; then she is shrouded.’”

gradings.raw: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف على المشهور - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (13/330)
gradings.label: ضعيف على المشهور
gradings.text: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف على المشهور - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (13/330)

narratorChain.raw: سَهْلُ بْنُ زِيَادٍ عَنِ ابْنِ مَحْبُوبٍ وَ أَحْمَدَ بْنِ مُحَمَّدٍ فِي
